compiled_state.title: Wire hook into session-start dispatcher and add config keys
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Edit plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh to:
1. Source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh (using CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT variable)
2. Add hook_directory_size_monitor to the dispatch loop in _session_start_dispatch()

Add config keys to .claude/dso-config.conf:
- directory_monitor.file_threshold=30
- directory_monitor.exclude_dirs=.git

Update the comment block at the top of session-start.sh to include the new hook in the execution order.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] session-start.sh sources directory-monitor.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'directory-monitor.sh' plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh
- [ ] hook_directory_size_monitor appears in the dispatch loop
  Verify: grep -q 'hook_directory_size_monitor' plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh
- [ ] dso-config.conf contains directory_monitor.file_threshold key
  Verify: grep -q 'directory_monitor.file_threshold' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] dso-config.conf contains directory_monitor.exclude_dirs key
  Verify: grep -q 'directory_monitor.exclude_dirs' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Uses CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT for sourcing (not hardcoded path)
  Verify: grep 'directory-monitor' plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh | grep -q 'CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'
